mapper.sql: user_id, username, password, email, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM t_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM t_user WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_user
username = #{username}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_user SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM t_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
